recommendations.title: The Bow

recommendations.title: The Witness
recommendations.overview: An ordinary man witnesses a cruel murder and becomes entangled in circumstances out of his control.

recommendations.title: A Dirty Carnival
recommendations.overview: A small-time thug who collects debts for the local triad is torn between his criminal aspirations and his devotion to family.

recommendations.title: Death Bell
recommendations.overview: In a prep-class for year-end exams, a sadistic killer puts the students through mind-games in order to save each other.

recommendations.title: Killing Cabos
recommendations.overview: Two young men get involved with some criminals while trying to free the tycoon they kidnapped.

recommendations.title: Lost in the Sun
recommendations.overview: A small time crook and a newly-orphaned teenage boy team up to perform a string of robberies.

recommendations.title: The City of Violence
recommendations.overview: Tae-su, a detective fighting organized crime, returns to his hometown for his high school friend Wang-jae's funeral. There, he meets his old friends Pil-ho, Dong-hwan and Seok-hwan and they reminisce. Suspecting something fishy about Wang-jae's death

recommendations.title: 1987: When the Day Comes

recommendations.title: Parasite
recommendations.overview: All unemployed, Ki-taek's family takes peculiar interest in the wealthy and glamorous Parks for their livelihood until they get entangled in an unexpected incident.
